title: A Survivors Guide To Navigating The Market Under The New Presidency
section_path: A Survivors Guide To Navigating The Market Under The New Presidency
section_path_text: A Survivors Guide To Navigating The Market Under The New Presidency
summary:
Main
The three things investors should know this week:
Trump 2.0 is markedly different from Trump 1.0, in terms of speed and depth of changes. Also, the new government generates an inordinate amount of economic and investment "noise" as it tries to shift the global status quo. The best way for money managers to approach things, thus, is to focus on the undeniable parts of the agenda where there's broader political support, at least within the ruling party: Tax cuts, deregulation, expenditure control, limiting immigration, improving US competitiveness across the board.
